^2 = GameID: CUSA19493,CUSA19521
^3 = NAME: Disciples liberation
^5 = APCRED: source: Pj1980
^4 = FILE: *
+Experience Main Character

+Unlock Liberation Mode
$8002001C 50006C00
$61007900 74006800
$72006F00 75006700
$68004300 6F006D00
$08000028 00000001
(it's possible to edit stats on some weapons and armour as long as they are not unique)
(the stats for them are in float in reverse hex (litte endian))
(search with hex editor 00 00 56 00 61 00 6C 00 75 00 65 00 the 4 bytes after are the stat value)
